reviews.review_description:
I just wanted to say I just got done playing your app. I never had so much games in cards to play for $5.03 solitaire games. Shooting games I’ve been looking for that shooting game. I am 88 years old. Stuck in a chair can’t stand and find this game. Excellent easy to play not complicated good graphics what more can I say? I’d give it more stars if they were up there job well done I’ll be looking for more a year games thank you￼￼
it would be nice to shoot a real looking gun and a lion or some thing that shows where you’re shooting I have the same trouble as the other guy. It’s hard to see where you’re shooting. Otherwise it’s still the best game I got. Hope you can help with the shooting. Thank you big T 
could you put a  pointer the end of the gun when the white dot is on something ￼ squeeze the trigger and that’s where the gun or shoot was just thinking thank you enjoying the game big t
             
love it would be great if you could put golf Solitaire on it my wife likes the game golf she plays the solitaire for hours thank you ￼



I wish you could update your app and add a couple more solitary games thank 




The game is still number five in my book. I love the solitaire God good games the only thing is they shooting games could use a gun that shoots and where it’s huge I have a very hard time trying to hit the targets with her a gunl and you 🏁🏁don’t Know where you’re shooting his last name the two shooting galleries and the roller coaster shooter are great. It just needs better guns to shoot with instead of air pistols. Thank you for listening I am just wishing ￼￼ 

I wish you could Answer any of the questions  YES Or No Just wondering if it’s still my number one game yes, I wish you could  Make it better I  can’t Hit much with Those air pistols, thank you  DUkE 👍￼￼￼￼￼


I am hoping soon s’more solitaire and shooting With a pistol instead of an. Air pistol ￼ Still my best game of the mall and return update 👍👍👍👍👍👍

developer_response.body: Hi, yes the idea is to use the iron sight that is on the gun, without any additional aid, but an aid could be added in a future update, thanks.

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this fun game , I like to support this type of game to get better.  Please continue to update this game, better user interface , so it is easy and simply to play.  Sometimes the controller is done , or disappeared  ?  Update the game play with the Quest 2 controller if possible.   Looking forward to more update of this game from the developers if possible because it can be fun game to enjoy, please.
Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi, only 1 controller can be used at a time, so only turn on the controller that you want to use.

More mini games will be added in the future.

thanks

reviews.review_description:
Sitting at a table in a gazebo playing a wide variety of beautifully crafted games.

In solitaire I found the cards a little hard to make out unless I leaned forward. Colouring a group of cards for movement was a bit fussy (to get just the group you wanted instead of more or fewer cards) and involved a step of uncolouring them first to make a correction. And, once all the cards were turned over, not being able to finish automatically, though realistic, felt a bit tiresome.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review. Let me know if you have any suggestions.

EDIT: Ok thanks, I will look into these problems for the next update.

reviews.review_title: Great value give it a try
reviews.review_description: Thought would just check this out. Was very surprised by how good the graphics are.  The gameplay  really good not noticed any glitch’s. Well worth the price ,this will be a good app to chill out with. Simple games but looks like great fun and  at very silly low price🤪🤪🤪

Wack-a-mold the bat wimps out on the fast part at the end. No, private mode to compete with friends and family. I would love to race my cousin to solve the puzzles. There are no redos, I can't take a step back if I accidentally hit the wrong piece. I have to restart the whole game again!  All the games need work.

It's impossible to shoot the targets the gun doesn't do anything, other than make a noise. 

Edit to respond. I know how to use the gun and the sight finder. The gun itself doesn't work on the track.

developer_response.body: Hi, you are supposed to use the iron sight on the gun by lining it up correctly, whilst closing one eye. thanks

reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed this game but it is still far from being ready to play.  I bought it for the Whack-a-mole game mostly.  Unfortunately, the physics and the mechanics are still off.  My movements and the hammers movements are not exactly correct.  I know it's not my headset because I played a different "whack-a-mole" game from App Lab that matched up perfectly.  

You can also swing the club side to side to knock down the moles which is a  problem.  Should only count if hit from above. 

The cups game work very well.  I think on my first try I made it up into the higher 20s levels. 

The solitaire game was cool, except it only has the option (that I could find) where it flips three cards over at a time.  There should be an option to change that to either one or two card flips at a time. 

Most of the graphics are still very unpolished.

It has potential but is a bit buggy at times. Could do with some settings options. For instance a choice of three card deal or one card deal in solitaire. Played over 40 games with not one win. 
But for what you pay it’s ok.

developer_response.body: Hi, a 1 or 3 card draw option has now been added to the klondike solitaire. Thanks

reviews.review_title: Target pistol and Checker Kinged piece?
reviews.review_description:
Graphics are very good. Puzzle Games make you really exercise your mind .
The target games are Very disappointing because of the late lagging to no shooting pistol. I bought this mainly for checkers..THE KINGED PIECES WILL NOT RESPOND TO THE Controller. THIS GAME IS A TOTAL RIP OFF . If it were free the cost would be too much...This multi game is a Jack of All Bugs. Wow App Lab and Mobile Fusion I hope that you will fix these bugs. Otherwise this is my last purchase from App lab and Mobile Fusion .I doubt that you even care about the issues I noted. $4.99 is too much for this buggy game. Can't get a refund towards a legit game .

Wasn’t really crazy about it the Solitaire table is way too close to you if it was a little for the back and I tried all the different settings and nothing seem to help so it was hard to play the cards

developer_response.body: Hi, if you hold the oculus button on the controller down, your seated position is then reset. This can then be used to adjust your position. Thanks
